description:
This catalog contains the datasets generated under Work Package 5 (WP5) of the 4DHydro project. 
 WP5 focuses on benchmarking and data assimilation experiments to enhance Land Surface Models (LSM) and Hydrological Models (HM) using high-resolution Earth Observation (EO) data. 
The datasets include results from various calibration and data assimilation experiments aimed at improving the accuracy and scalability of hydrological models. 
 These products are vital for achieving the project's goal of integrated EO and LSM/HM modeling to better understand and predict the hydrological cycle.
